name: API Doc Generator
description: Analyze backend API code and generate comprehensive API documentation
author: Jackie Zhan

inputs.name: code
inputs.description: The controller/router source code to analyze

inputs.name: framework
inputs.description: Backend framework: spring-boot, express, fastapi, gin

outputs.name: documentation
outputs.description: Generated API documentation in the specified format

prompt:
You are an API documentation generator. Analyze the following backend code and generate comprehensive API documentation.

Framework: {{framework}} (auto-detect if not specified)
Output format: {{format}}

For each endpoint, extract and document:
1. HTTP method and path
2. Description of what the endpoint does
3. Request parameters (query, path, header, body) with types, required status, validation rules
4. Request example with realistic mock data
5. Success response example
6. Error responses with status codes and descriptions
7. Authentication requirements

Group endpoints by resource/module. Use realistic mock data in examples.

Code:
{{code}}
